gpt_5_6_group_out_panel_solvedness.definition: Task strata are assigned using only configurations outside the excluded model group, so every configuration in the group is evaluated on the same labels and none contributes to those labels.

leave_one_family_out_panel_solvedness.definition: Each target model family's task strata are assigned using only outcomes from configurations outside that family. This removes the target family's own outcomes from its panel-solvedness labels.

mechanism_identification.reason: Less-polarized task outcomes can arise from attempt-level strategy variation, a less-polarized distribution of task success probabilities, sampling settings, or other unobserved execution differences.

source_metadata.leaderboard_scope: Every DeepSWE rollout across imported Pier jobs, grouped by configuration (harness + model + reasoning effort)
source_metadata.trial_scope: Every DeepSWE rollout and every cross-benchmark trial, after fairness filtering
